data.title: Amber Group deposited $10.35 million of ENA to Binance in the past 12 hours
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa, Amber Group, one of ENA's market makers, has recharged about $10.35 million of ENA to Binance in the past 12 hours. Among them, 6.96 million ENA (about $2.5 million) came from the part withdrawn from Binance at an average price of $0.3979 two weeks ago, and 21.87 million ENA (about $7.85 million) came from the Ethena Claim address around April 7, 2024.

data.title: BNB Drops Below 630 USDT with a Narrowed 0.13% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 22, 2025, 03:16 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 630 USDT and is now trading at 629.880005 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.13% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Fidelity to Launch Tokenized U.S. Treasury Fund Competing with BlackRock's BUIDL
data.description: According to Odaily, Fidelity is set to introduce a tokenized fund focused on investing in U.S. Treasury securities. This move positions Fidelity in direct competition with BlackRock's BUIDL fund, which also targets similar investment opportunities.

data.title: The LAYER whale that opened a position three weeks ago is suspected to have liquidated its position to take profit, and may have made a profit of US$1.704 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa, the smart money (TOP6 whales) who opened a position of 6 million $LAYER at an average price of $0.9559 three weeks ago was suspected to have cleared the position 5 hours ago. If the sale is confirmed, the expected profit is $1.704 million, with a return rate of about 78%.
Against the background of BTC's downward fluctuations, $LAYER's trend is against the trend and is currently reported at $1.16. Another address also opened a position during the same period, and has not yet stopped profit. The floating profit is about $1.118 million, with a return rate of 47.7%.

data.title: Whale Unstakes 38,821 SOL After Year of Inactivity
data.description: According to PANews, a significant cryptocurrency holder has unstaked 38,821 SOL, valued at $5 million, after a year of inactivity. The whale initially staked 35,777 SOL and earned an additional 3,044 SOL. Despite this, the holder is facing a loss exceeding $100,000.

data.title: Fidelity to launch tokenized fund investing in U.S. Treasuries, competing with BlackRock’s BUIDL
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Fidelity will launch a tokenized fund that invests in U.S. Treasury bonds to compete with BlackRock's BUIDL. (AggrNews)

data.title: Whales Move ETH: Can Ethereum Price Breaks Past $2,000?
data.description:
Ethereum price aimed to surge past the $2,000 mark, signaling renewed market activity. Large investors, commonly referred to as whales, have been making major moves, transferring substantial amounts of ETH from exchanges and into lending protocols. This movement has drawn attention from analysts who suggest that Ethereum could be entering a bullish phase.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/03/21/whales-move-eth-can-ethereum-price-breaks-past-2000/

data.title: Whale unlocks 38,821 SOL after a year of silence, still faces losses of more than $100,000
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to @OnchainLens monitoring, a whale address unlocked 38,821 SOL (worth about $5 million) after a year of silence. The address initially pledged 35,777 SOL and received 3,044 SOL rewards during the period, but at the current price, it still faces an unrealized loss of more than $100,000.

data.title: Whale Alert Reports Burning of 50 Million USDC on Ethereum
data.description:
50 million USDC reportedly burned on Ethereum chain. Impact on stablecoin market and investor reactions are crucial to observe.
source: https://coincu.com/327878-usdc-50-million-burn-event

data.title: XRP Price To $27: Why Current ‘Boredom Phase’ Could Trigger Epic Rally
data.description:
A crypto analyst has predicted that the XRP price could hit $27 soon. He describes the cryptocurrency’s current price action as a “ Bermuda Triangle or boredom phase” — a period where the market moves slowly or sideways, fuelling doubt and uncertainty among traders and investors before a price rally.  XRP Price Boredom Phase To Trigger $27 Surge Crypto analyst Egrag Crypto has warned that the XRP price is in a Bermuda Triangle, a boredom phase characterized by price stagnation and market uncertainty designed to shake out weak hands before a significant price move. According to his prediction, while traders and investors are growing impatient and questioning why XRP has not experienced any notable price increases, this phase is merely a set-up for a strong rally toward $27
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/analysis/xrp/xrp-boredom-phase-rally/
